title: Mission Muh Dikhayi
overview: Mission Muh Dikhayi follows Anjana, a modern woman who marries Devesh, an engineer from Delhi. Two days later, the Muh Dikhayi ritual ignites culture clash, emotional conflict, and a struggle between modern values and tradition.
